text.title: Kibana Queries, Dashboards, and Alerting Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboard queries time out under load; cluster CPU pegged at 100%.
antipattern.root-cause: Wildcard on `message` bypasses inverted index — full document scan.
antipattern.fix: Switch to `level:` and `service:` keyword filters; index structured fields.

antipattern.symptom: Slow dashboards even though row count is low.
antipattern.fix: Move all time-range and term filters into `bool.filter`.

antipattern.symptom: Service went silent for 6 hours; nobody noticed until users complained.
antipattern.root-cause: Only rate-based alerts; no count<1 detector.
antipattern.fix: Add a missing-heartbeat alert per critical service.

antipattern.symptom: Webhook actions vanish after Kibana restart.
antipattern.fix: Set the encryption key in `kibana.yml` before configuring connectors.
